svg.text: JUNE 9 → JUNE 28 · GOAL: 3 SEMINARS BOOKED · 1 SCHOOL SIGNED · TRAINER GUIDE COMPLETE
Begin Trainer Guide — Session 1 to 8 fully scripted (what to say, what to show, timings)
Format: slide number → trainer instruction → key talking point → student activity → time check. Every session bulletproof.
DAY 5–7 · SOUMYA: Follow up all 20 schools. Book minimum 3 seminar slots for Week 3.
→ assessment. Anyone can pick this up and deliver.
Date, time, venue locked for all 3.
Identify 1 warm school for the close.
Run the seminar 2× end-to-end. Record it. Watch it back. Fix every weak moment.
Nimai delivers slides 1–12 (AI landscape, why now, career impact). Soumya delivers 13–20 (UpMentor solution, credentials, partnership CTA).
Deliver all 3 free seminars. Collect data at every one.
At each seminar: attendance sheet, feedback form, WhatsApp group created on the spot.
End every seminar: "We only partner with 1 school per area. We have 3 schools interested in yours."
Same day follow-up: send proposal + call principal within 4 hours.
ASSETS CLAUDE WILL BUILD FOR YOU THIS WEEK
⚠ CRITICAL: July enrollment window closes in 20 days.
Miss it and you wait until April 2026 for the next real enrollment window. Every day of delay = real cost.
